name: Spumoni Bombe
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 2-quart melon mold and chill in the freezer.
2. In the top of a double boiler, beat milk, egg yolks, and sugar until frothy.
3. Set over simmering water and heat, stirring constantly until the mixture coats a metal spoon and has no raw egg taste. Remove from heat and cool.
4. Mix in vanilla and toasted almonds. Pour into a refrigerator tray and freeze until mushy.
5. Scoop out with a bowl and beat hard until fluffy. Return to the tray, cover, and freeze until creamy-firm but not hard.
6. Pack firmly into the melon mold, smoothing with the back of a spoon to form a thick, even lining. Cover and freeze for 1/2 hour.
7. Meanwhile, whip cream with sugar until soft peaks form. Beat egg white to soft peaks and fold into the cream along with remaining ingredients (candied citrus peels, marachino cherries).
8. Spoon filling into the center of the melon mold, cover, and freeze overnight.
9. Unmold on a serving platter, loosening if necessary by running a warmed cloth over the bottom of the mold.
10. Decorate with desired garnish. To serve, cut into wedges.
